summary: Community scrapers validation completed with issues. MotorcycleRoads scraper functional but produces only 30 routes vs >50 expected. BestBikingRoads scraper functional but extremely slow (9+ hours to reach 10k routes vs 30-60 min expected). Both scrapers respect robots.txt and rate limits correctly.

issues: Scraper deduplicates aggressively - finds 30 route links per state page but only scrapes unique routes across all states
Likely due to route cross-listing or site structure changes
Estimated 9+ hours to reach 10k routes vs 30-60 minutes expected
Rate limiting may be too conservative for this source
bestbikingroads.note: Scraper still running in background, will continue to accumulate routes

recommendations: Investigate site structure changes for both sources
Consider adjusting rate limits or parallelizing state scrapers
Review deduplication logic for MR scraper
Consider pagination improvements for BBR scraper
